name: rbp-gameplay-check
comment: Dogfood: drive a ModDebugKit cav-clash battle while RealisticBattlePlanning's debug plan governs it, and capture the three playtest fixes as one trajectory. Layout (queued during deployment, auto-applied at ready) puts cav in the Skirmisher slot (5, FlankArc) and HA in the LightCavalry slot (7, circle) to match rbp_debug_plan.json. Read track.jsonl: formation 1 (Infantry) holds; formation 5 (Cavalry) order goes Move -> Charge as it flanks home; formation 7 (Horse Archer) keeps moving/orbiting at standoff, never charging. rbp-check-final.json is the player-only end state.
